action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.6537 (tau=1.7, val_tau=0.644, few_shot=0.487) from RN50 cRT 2-stage (Focal gamma2/sqrt-sampler/mix-cut-rand/s1-60ep AdamW+RandAug, CE/count-sampler/s2-40ep SGD0.05-nesterov on fc, post-tau grid). Stage vals ~0.56->0.583. Strong for IR=100 LT. Analysis: ConvNeXtTiny (timm in22k_ft_in1k pretrained, ~28M params) is stronger backbone than RN50 for similar compute; should improve base features/headroom for tail without changing LT recipe. TrivialAugmentWide often outperforms RandAug on CIFAR; label_smoothing=0.1 + focal_gamma=1.5 + s1=50/s2=30 stabilizes. Current code (model self.fc compat, weights_only=False, best_tau+counts in ckpt, metrics logging, validate+grid) is stable per recent runs. Decision: Update model.py to ConvNeXtTiny (keep class name for compat), rewrite full clean train.py (incremental improvements: new backbone compat, TrivialAugmentWide, gamma=1.5, label_smoothing=0.1 in s2 CE, s1=50/s2=30ep, proper named_params freeze+reinit head in s2, full mix/cut rand 50%, per-epoch+periodic loss logging, best-save across stages+tau grid 0-3@0.05). Train then submit_eval immediately (expected >0.65 bal_acc, ~5-6min fits budget/remaining 6 iters, follows >20ep rule).
